nasb.text: But so that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins”—He *said to the paralytic,

esv.text: But that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins”—he said to the paralytic—

cnv.text: 然而為了要你們知道人子在地上有赦罪的權柄，

ccb.text: 但我要让你们知道人子在世上有赦罪的权柄。”于是祂对瘫子说：

csbs.text: 不过为要使你们知道人子在地上有赦免罪的权柄——”耶稣就对瘫痪的人说：
